positive: A detailed, highly aesthetic botanical arrangement featuring deep indigo, burnt orange, and emerald green wildflowers, rendered in a delicate watercolor and ink style. Minimalist composition, perfect for a repeating pattern, trending on ArtStation, soft focus, elegant, natural light.
